ingredients_text: Cooked Mashed Potatoes (56%) (Potatoes, Salt, White Pepper), Mince Beef Filling (44%) (Beef 19% (Minced Beef 15%, Beef Protein), Water, Carrots 6%, Onions 3%, Tomato Puree, Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Modified Maize Starch, Salt, Cornflour, Malted Barley Extract, Onion Powder, Dextrose, Flavouring, Stabiliser (Pentasodium Triphosphate), White Pepper, Soya Protein Concentrate, Lovage, Rusk [Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Salt, Raising Agent (Ammonium Hydrogen Carbonate)], Ginger).
